creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> Synopsis: games/endgame-singularity -- update and request maintainership
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=133587

Why did you add -music to depends? The game runs perfectly without
it.  Instead, it makes sence to make -music depend on endgame-singularity,
to more verbosely state that it's an optional addition for the game
port and it uses directory tree of the latter.

--
